title: Smoke-Hot French Peppercorns Eclair
description: Tangy and springy, this meal-prep eclair features a delicate balance of smoke-hot French peppercorns with a hint of sweetness. Perfect for a quick breakfast or snack on-the-go.
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Roll out puff pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch and cut into a rectangle approximately 9x12 inches.
In a small saucepan, combine heavy cream, granulated sugar, and French peppercorns. Heat over low heat, stirring occasionally, until the mixture starts to simmer.
Pour the peppercorn-infused cream into a bowl and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
On a lightly floured surface, roll out the chilled puff pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch and cut into a rectangle approximately 9x12 inches.
Place the pastry on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and brush with egg wash.
Bake the pastry for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown and puffed.
Allow the pastry to cool completely before filling with the peppercorn-infused cream.
Once the pastry is cool, use a piping bag to fill with the peppercorn-infused cream and top with a sprinkle of French peppercorns.
Slice into individual servings and serve chilled.
